LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, SEP-02-2022 HEARING HELD RE: PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED PETITION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE IS GRANTED. calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. RICHARD R. RIOS, Esq. of Olson Remcho, LLP (Tel: 916-442-2952) for Petitioners John Elberling and Kaylah Williams;
Atty. ANA FLORES, Esq. of San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-4661) for Respondent John Arntz, in his official capacity as Director of the San Francisco Department of Elections.

HEARING RE: PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The unopposed petition for peremptory writ of mandate is granted.

The Court signs the proposed order and the proposed judgment submitted by the parties.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
